name: No Bake Butterscotch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch morsels and peanut butter over low heat.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the corn flakes and peanuts.
3. Pour the melted mixture over the dry ingredients.
4. Mix until all the dry mixture is evenly covered.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto a cookie sheet lined with wax paper.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
